'''zhajofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmending|roadmending]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmending|roadmending]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhajofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjefeth|zhæjefeth]] || [[word:zhæjefej|zhæjefej]] || [[word:zhæjefesh|zhæjefesh]] || [[word:zhæjefe|zhæjefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajojofoth|zhajojofoth]] || [[word:zhajojofoj|zhajojofoj]] || [[word:zhajojofosh|zhajojofosh]] || [[word:zhajojofo|zhajojofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajofoth|zhajofoth]] || [[word:zhajofoj|zhajofoj]] || [[word:zhajofosh|zhajofosh]] || [[word:zhajofo|zhajofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajoffoth|zhajoffoth]] || [[word:zhajoffoj|zhajoffoj]] || [[word:zhajoffosh|zhajoffosh]] || [[word:zhajoffof|zhajoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajofotho|zhajofotho]] || [[word:zhajofojo|zhajofojo]] || [[word:zhajofosho|zhajofosho]] || [[word:zhajofoko|zhajofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajofoth|zhajofoth]] || [[word:zhajofoj|zhajofoj]] || [[word:zhajofosh|zhajofosh]] || [[word:zhajofo|zhajofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajofothol|zhajofothol]] || [[word:zhajofojol|zhajofojol]] || [[word:zhajofoshol|zhajofoshol]] || [[word:zhajofokol|zhajofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajofothotho|zhajofothotho]] || [[word:zhajofojojo|zhajofojojo]] || [[word:zhajofoshosho|zhajofoshosho]] || [[word:zhajofoko|zhajofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajofothon|zhajofothon]] || [[word:zhajofojon|zhajofojon]] || [[word:zhajofoshon|zhajofoshon]] || [[word:zhajofokon|zhajofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajofothoro|zhajofothoro]] || [[word:zhajofojoro|zhajofojoro]] || [[word:zhajofoshoro|zhajofoshoro]] || [[word:zhajofokoro|zhajofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
